ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state transition event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment ID of the state transition event */,
  "state_initial" INTEGER /* Initial state of the system before the action */,
  "action_taken" INTEGER /* Action taken to trigger the transition */,
  "state_final" INTEGER /* Final state of the system after the action */,
  "xcm_initial" REAL /* Initial x-coordinate of the system in centimeters */,
  "ycm_initial" REAL /* Initial y-coordinate of the system in centimeters */,
  "xcm_final" REAL /* Final x-coordinate of the system in centimeters */,
  "ycm_final" REAL /* Final y-coordinate of the system in centimeters */,
  "theta_initial" REAL /* Initial orientation angle in degrees */,
  "theta_final" REAL /* Final orientation angle in degrees */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the state transition event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who triggered the state transition */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message of the state transition event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "user_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who took the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Action ID of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Transition ID of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

Equipment ID of the state transition event
